creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-09 16:13:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/drupal5-nodewords Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This module allows you to set some meta tags for each node, view or panels
  page.  Giving more attention to the important keywords and/or description on
  some of your nodes allows you to get better search engine positioning.
  
  WWW: http://drupal.org/project/nodewords
  
  PR:             ports/128687
  Submitted by:   Nick Hilliard <nick at netability.ie>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2172    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/www/drupal5-nodewords/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/drupal5-nodewords/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/drupal5-nodewords/pkg-descr (new)
